notableEvents.label: Brayan Rocchio GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brayan Rocchio grounds into a double play, third baseman Kazuma Okamoto to second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Bo Naylor out at 2nd. Brayan Rocchio out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Myles Straw pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Myles Straw lines out sharply to center fielder Angel Martínez.

notableEvents.label: Eloy Jiménez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Eloy Jiménez grounds into a double play, third baseman José Ramírez to second baseman Daniel Schneemann to first baseman Kyle Manzardo. Kazuma Okamoto to 3rd. Andrés Giménez out at 2nd. Eloy Jiménez out at 1st.
